text: Orders issued by the department of transportation pursuant to the provisions of this chapter shall be deemed to be rules and regulations for the purpose of taking judicial notice thereof.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 8
#### Article 36. State Dept. of Transp.
##### § 1611 — Effect of department orders

Orders issued by the department of transportation pursuant to the provisions of this chapter shall be deemed to be rules and regulations for the purpose of taking judicial notice thereof.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
